embed.title: !lure
embed.description: Alerts for lure modules active at pokestops.

fields.name: Lure types
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}lure glacial` — Glacial Lure (ice/water)
`{{prefix}}lure mossy` — Mossy Lure (bug/grass/poison)
`{{prefix}}lure magnetic` — Magnetic Lure (electric/rock/steel)
`{{prefix}}lure rainy` — Rainy Lure (psychic-exclusive spawns in the rain)
`{{prefix}}lure sparkly` — Sparkly Lure
`{{prefix}}lure normal` — standard Lure Module
`{{prefix}}lure everything` — any lure

fields.name: Message flags
fields.value:
`clean` — auto-delete when the lure expires
`edit` — single message edited in place
`ping`
